errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

toast.turnstileRequiredDesc: Solve the Turnstile challenge below before continuing
toast.registerSuccessDesc: Switch to the login tab and complete verification to sign in
toast.forgotFailedDesc: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
toast.magicLinkFailedDesc: Failed to send magic link. Please try again.

verify.title: Check Your Email
verify.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please click the link to verify your account before logging in.
verify.checkSpam: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder.

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.successDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.

magicLink.title: Magic Link Login
magicLink.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to login instantly — no password needed.
magicLink.successDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a magic login link.

banners.verified: Email verified successfully! You can now login.
banners.resetDone: Password reset successfully! Login with your new password.
banners.magicLinkVerified: Email verified via magic link! You can now login.
banners.expiredToken: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
banners.invalidToken: Invalid link. Please request a new one.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully.
resetPassword.invalidTokenDesc: This password reset link is invalid or missing. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorDesc: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
